stages.title: Baseline audit
validation: Confirm source-root vs public sync ownership from package.json
Document all live .skye implementations and drift
stages.notes: Completed. Six live logic owners were audited and assigned to migration stages; source-root sync ownership was confirmed from package.json.

stages.title: Canonical contract spec
targetFiles: DEVV ONLY NO GIT/Implementation Directive For .SKYE Files
validation: Legacy-read and app compatibility matrix written
stages.notes: Completed. Canonical write contract fixed to skye-secure-v1 with 120000 PBKDF2 iterations and explicit legacy-read scope.

stages.title: Shared runtime extraction plan
validation: One shared browser-safe runtime path defined
stages.notes: Completed. Shared TypeScript runtime, browser artifact, and sync script are in place and wired into sync:surfaces.

stages.title: SuperIDE shell migration
stages.notes: Completed. The shell now exports canonical plaintext payloads and reads canonical or migration-only legacy formats through the shared runtime.

stages.title: Source-root surface migrations
validation: Source roots migrated or formally blocked
stages.notes: Completed. SkyeBlog, SovereignVariables, and SkyeDocxPro now consume the shared browser runtime from their source roots; the protected DocxPro manifest pin was intentionally repointed to the audited migrated artifact after confirming the previous pin had gone stale across later commits.

stages.title: Direct-public platform migrations
stages.notes: Completed. SkyeMail and SkyeChat now consume the shared browser .skye runtime, retain platform identity, and enforce canonical payload validation with app-local legacy compatibility.

stages.title: Backend and audit alignment
stages.notes: Completed. Existing app-record routes remain the persistence path, rollout apps were added to a shared allowlist, and schema notes now make client-only envelope handling explicit.

stages.title: Golden files and validation tests
stages.notes: Completed. Secure-envelope fixture coverage now validates canonical contract constants, real roundtrip behavior, tamper rejection, wrong-app rejection, and legacy adapter scope through runtime-backed scripts.

stages.title: Release gates and smoke integration
stages.notes: Completed. Release checklist output now exposes `.skye` contracts explicitly, smokehouse references the release-visible checks, and the smoke matrix names the exact `.skye` gates.

stages.title: Handoff protocol
validation: Next-pass flow does not require chat history
stages.notes: Completed for this pass. Control files were updated after each dependency-safe stage, protected-app validation now passes for the migrated DocxPro artifact, and the latest release-checklist failures are explicitly recorded as non-.skye issues in external endpoint and secure-default policy checks.
